leadText: Poni Grove (Japanese: ポニの樹林 Poni Grove) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, located northeast of Ancient Poni Path and south of Poni Plains. It can only be explored after the player has become Champion.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Poni Grove is a short, lush path connecting the western and eastern sides of Poni Island. It is filled with tall grass , trees, and several Trainers .

sections.title: Items
